post.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive a JWT access token

400.description: Email already exists or validation error

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information

post.description: Generate and send OTP to user email for verification
Verify the OTP sent to user email

get.description: Check if the API is running

post.description: Creates a return and restores stock. Use `returnType: INVOICE` for a FULL return (invoice → RETURNED) or `returnType: PARTIAL_RETURN` when returning only some items (invoice → PARTIALLY_RETURNED). Refund amounts are auto-calculated from the original invoice prices — no need to send them.

get.summary: List all returns with optional filters

post.description: Returns specified items from an original invoice and creates a new exchange invoice for the given items. The return credit (from original prices) is applied as a deduction on the new bill. Customer pays only the difference (or receives a refund if credit > new items cost). Exchange invoice shows: subtotal, returnCredit, discount (coupon), gstAmount, finalAmount.
post.summary: Process an exchange — return items + issue new items in one step

get.summary: Get a single return by ID (includes exchange invoice if applicable)

get.description: Returns the live summary of the biller's active DRAFT invoice along with all available vouchers that can be applied. Returns an empty cart if nothing has been scanned yet. Branch is derived from the logged-in biller — no parameters needed. Available vouchers are filtered by branch, active campaigns, and redemption status. Optionally provide customer phone to filter vouchers for a specific customer.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Customer phone number to filter available vouchers

get.summary: Get biller's current cart with available vouchers

delete.description: Deletes the biller's DRAFT invoice and all its items. Use to start fresh or cancel billing.

post.description: Adds the scanned product to the cart. Scanning the same barcode again increments quantity by 1. The DRAFT invoice is auto-created on the very first scan.
post.summary: Scan a barcode into the cart

patch.description: Set a new quantity for the given variant. Send `quantity: 0` to remove the item entirely.
patch.summary: Update quantity of a cart item

post.description: Atomically converts the DRAFT invoice to COMPLETED: deducts stock, applies coupon, redeems vouchers, records payment. Customer is resolved by phone (created if new). All discount/voucher fields are optional.

get.description: Returns all unredeemed vouchers from active campaigns at the biller's branch that can be applied to the current cart. Branch is derived from the logged-in biller. Vouchers are filtered based on campaign status and date validity.
get.summary: Get available vouchers for the current bill

get.description: Returns customer details to pre-fill the checkout form. Returns null if not found (new customer).
get.summary: Look up a customer by phone number

get.description: Returns matching variants with stock at the biller's branch. Branch is derived from JWT — no branchId needed.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Name, partial SKU, or partial barcode

get.summary: Search products by name, SKU, or barcode

get.description: Returns product info for the barcode. Does not modify the cart.
get.summary: Look up a barcode without adding to cart

post.description: Calculate subtotal, GST, and total for the given items + optional coupon. Nothing is saved. Branch is derived from JWT.
Create an invoice directly without using the cart flow. Requires full item list with prices. Branch and biller are derived from JWT — no branchId or userId needed in the body.

get.description: Branch is derived from JWT. Filter by status, date range, or search string.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Invoice number, customer name or phone

get.summary: Paginated invoice history for the biller's branch
Return history for the biller's branch

post.description: Delegates to POST /returns. Use returnType: INVOICE for full return, PARTIAL_RETURN for partial.
post.summary: Process a return from an existing invoice

get.description: Branch derived from JWT. Optionally filter by product name or SKU.
get.summary: Stock levels at the biller's branch

get.description: Branch derived from JWT. Optionally filter by date range.
get.summary: Sales analytics for the biller's branch

post.description: Upload an image file to Amazon S3 bucket. Accepts JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WEBP formats. Maximum file size: 5MB.
post.summary: Upload a single image to S3

post.description: Upload up to 10 image files to Amazon S3 bucket. Accepts JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WEBP formats. Maximum file size per image: 5MB.

files.description: Array of image files to upload (max 10)

post.description: Delete a file from S3 bucket using its URL

url.description: Full S3 URL of the file to delete

delete.summary: Soft delete a tag (set status to DELETED)

get.description: Get paginated product list with advanced filtering: search by name, filter by tags, colors, sizes, price range, category, brand. Authentication optional - if authenticated, includes wishlist/cart status.
get.summary: List products with filters (for website users)

get.description: Get detailed product information. Authentication optional - if authenticated, includes wishlist/cart status.
get.summary: Get product details by ID (for website users)

info.title: Kingfox ERP API
info.description:
## Kingfox Clothing ERP — REST API Reference

A comprehensive backend for managing a multi-branch clothing retail business.

### 🔐 Authentication
All protected endpoints require a **Bearer JWT** token.
1. Call `POST /v1/auth/login` with your credentials
2. Copy the `access_token` from the response
3. Click **Authorize** (🔓) at the top and paste the token

### 📦 Seeded Test Credentials
| Role     | Email                    | Password       |
|----------|--------------------------|----------------|
| Admin    | admin@kingfox.com        | Admin@1234     |
| Manager  | manager1@kingfox.com     | Manager@123    |
| Staff    | staff1@kingfox.com       | Staff@123      |
| Cashier  | cashier1@kingfox.com     | Cashier@123    |

### 🏪 Seeded Branches
| ID | Name                 | Type       |
|----|----------------------|------------|
| 1  | Main Shop            | SHOP       |
| 2  | Central Warehouse    | WAREHOUSE  |
| 3  | North Branch Shop    | SHOP       |
| 4  | South Branch Shop    | SHOP       |

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: 🧾 Cashier/biller workflow — scan, bill, checkout, analytics

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: 🏷️ Product tags for filtering and categorization

tags.name: User - Products
tags.description: 🛍️ Public product listing with filters (for website users)

tags.name: Lucky Draw
tags.description: 🎰 Lucky draw campaigns and voucher issuance

role.description: Role name: admin | manager | staff | cashier

email.description: Email address to send OTP / password reset link to
Email address the OTP was sent to

password.description: Login password (min 8 chars). If omitted, an invite email is sent.

branchId.description: Branch ID to assign this user to
New Branch ID to move user to

name.description: Role name — must be unique (e.g. admin, manager, staff, cashier)

text.example: Machine wash cold with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

description.example: Premium 100% cotton round-neck T-shirt, pre-shrunk and color-fast.

example.title: Size Guide
example.text: Available in S, M, L, XL sizes

metaInfo.description: Array of meta information with title, text, and optional image

tagIds.description: Array of Tag IDs to associate with the product

costPrice.description: Cost price per unit at time of purchase (₹)

items.description: Line items in the purchase order

discountValue.description: Discount value — percentage (25 = 25%) or flat ₹ amount

minPurchaseAmount.description: Minimum cart value required to apply coupon (₹)

maxDiscountAmount.description: Cap on discount amount for PERCENTAGE type (₹)

usageLimit.description: Maximum number of times this coupon can be used

price.description: Selling price per unit at time of billing (₹)

customerId.description: Customer ID — omit for walk-in (cash) customers

branchId.description: Branch/Shop ID where invoice is being raised

userId.description: Cashier / staff User ID raising the invoice

tax.description: Tax percentage to apply (e.g., 18 for 18% GST)

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

returnType.description: INVOICE — full shop return (invoice → RETURNED) | PARTIAL_RETURN — some items returned (invoice → PARTIALLY_RETURNED) | ONLINE_ORDER — e-commerce return

items.description: Items being returned — refund amount is auto-calculated from the original invoice price

variantId.description: Variant ID being returned from the original invoice
Variant ID the customer is receiving (new item)

invoiceId.description: Original invoice ID to return items from

returnItems.description: Items being returned from the original invoice

exchangeItems.description: New items the customer is taking in exchange

paymentMethod.description: Payment method if customer needs to pay a difference: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

couponCode.description: Coupon code to apply on the exchange invoice (optional)

gstPercent.description: GST percentage to apply on the exchange bill. Defaults to 0.

description.example: Participate and win exciting prizes this summer!

totalVouchersLimit.description: Maximum total vouchers that can be issued

branchIds.description: Array of Branch IDs to associate with this campaign

branchId.description: Branch ID where voucher is being issued

issuedBy.description: User ID of staff issuing the voucher

invoiceId.description: Related invoice ID (if issued upon purchase)

minimumPurchaseAmount.description: Minimum purchase amount required to use this voucher

maximumPurchaseAmount.description: Maximum purchase amount this voucher can be applied to

price.description: Selling price per unit at time of order (₹)

warehouseBranchId.description: Warehouse branch ID that will fulfil the order

contactPerson.description: Primary contact person at the courier company

trackingUrlTemplate.description: URL template for shipment tracking — use {tracking_id} as placeholder

isActive.description: Whether this agent is currently active

createdBy.description: User ID of the staff creating the shipment record

trackingUrl.description: Direct tracking URL for the shipment

toBranchId.description: Destination branch ID (shop receiving the stock)

barcode.description: Barcode of the product to scan into the cart

gstPercent.description: GST percentage (e.g. 5 for 5%). Stored on first scan; subsequent scans use the stored value. Defaults to 0.

quantity.description: New quantity. Send 0 to remove the item entirely.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

customerName.description: Required only when the phone number is new to the system

voucherCodes.description: Lucky draw voucher codes to redeem against this invoice.

branchId.description: Branch ID where the voucher is valid

customerId.description: Customer ID who owns this voucher

count.description: Number of available vouchers for this bill

vouchers.description: List of vouchers that can be applied to the current bill

variantId.description: Variant ID to add to the bill

items.description: All items in the current bill — call this each time an item is added/removed

couponCode.description: Coupon code to apply a discount

gstPercent.description: GST percentage on the discounted subtotal (e.g. 5 for 5%). Defaults to 0.

price.description: Agreed selling price per unit (₹) — from preview response

customerPhone.description: Customer's mobile number — used to find or create the customer

customerName.description: Required when the phone number is new

voucherCodes.description: Lucky draw voucher codes to redeem against this invoice.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

gstPercent.description: GST percentage on the discounted subtotal. Defaults to 0.

items.description: Items being sold — use prices from /billing/preview
